name: Worker (Main)
description: Primary background worker — generation, analysis, media ingestion/derivatives, prompt tagging/embeddings, chains, and housekeeping (credit refresh, log cleanup). Deferred retries run in the separate generation-retry worker.

settings.label: Offload derivatives to dedicated worker
settings.description: Route thumbnail/preview (ffmpeg) jobs to the Worker (Derivatives) queue instead of running them here. Keeps a burst of generations from spawning many concurrent ffmpeg processes on this worker and starving generation/API. Requires Worker (Derivatives) to be running.
